goa_tours.name: Hot Balloon Safari
goa_tours.highlights: Bird’s-eye view of Goa’s hinterlands and scenic landscapes.

goa_tours.name: Rome of the Orient
goa_tours.highlights: Explore Old Goa churches including Se Cathedral and Basilica of Bom Jesus, and Panjim city heritage.

goa_tours.name: Heritage Trails
goa_tours.highlights: Visit Menezes Braganza House, Palacio do Deao and Goa Chitra Museum.

goa_tours.name: Temple & Spice Tour
goa_tours.highlights: Mangueshi Temple visit followed by a spice plantation tour with traditional Goan lunch.

goa_tours.name: Cola Beach Tour
goa_tours.highlights: Stay and relax at secluded Cola Beach surrounded by nature.

goa_tours.name: Anjuna Flea Market
goa_tours.highlights: Shop for handicrafts, clothes, souvenirs and local items.

goa_tours.name: Secrets of Divar Island on Cycle
goa_tours.highlights: Cycle through scenic Divar Island villages and countryside.

goa_tours.name: Culinary Delights
goa_tours.highlights: Cook and enjoy authentic Goan cuisine with local chefs.

goa_tours.name: The Essential Whiskey Experience
goa_tours.highlights: Visit the Paul John Whisky distillery and enjoy tasting sessions.

goa_tours.name: Island Fantasy
goa_tours.highlights: Dolphin viewing, snorkeling and swim at Virgin Beach.

goa_tours.name: Crocodile Dundee
goa_tours.highlights: Backwater cruise with crocodile spotting and bird watching.

goa_tours.name: White Water Rafting
goa_tours.highlights: Exciting rafting experience on the Mhadei River near Valpoi.

goa_tours.name: The Goan Village Tour
goa_tours.highlights: Experience authentic Goan village life and traditions.

goa_tours.name: Feni & Food
goa_tours.days_of_operation: Mid October till end of May
goa_tours.highlights: Visit Goa’s famous Feni cellar and enjoy local cuisine.

goa_tours.name: Bird Watching Tour
goa_tours.highlights: Bird watching at Carambolim Lake and wetlands.

goa_tours.name: Diving
goa_tours.highlights: Scuba diving experience exploring Goa’s marine life.

goa_tours.name: Fishing Trip
goa_tours.highlights: Deep sea fishing in the Arabian Sea.

goa_tours.name: Deep Sea Cruising
goa_tours.highlights: Luxury yacht cruise with dolphin spotting and BBQ.

goa_tours.name: Backwater Cruise
goa_tours.highlights: Houseboat cruise through Goa’s scenic backwaters.

goa_tours.name: Dandeli Wildlife
goa_tours.highlights: Jungle safari at Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary.

goa_tours.name: Kayaking Expedition
goa_tours.highlights: Kayaking through Goa’s mangroves and backwaters.

goa_tours.name: Dudhsagar Waterfalls
goa_tours.highlights: Jeep safari and swim at Dudhsagar waterfall.

kashmir.description: Tour package exploring Srinagar, Gulmarg, Pahalgam and Kashmir Valley.

himachal.description: Explore Shimla, Manali and scenic Himalayan landscapes.

uttarakhand.description: Nature focused tour exploring mountains and valleys.
Focus on temples, culture and heritage.
Pilgrimage to Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath and Badrinath.

rajasthan.description: Visit Jaipur, Udaipur, Jodhpur and Jaisalmer forts and palaces.

golden_quadrangle.description: Extended Golden Triangle covering Delhi, Agra, Jaipur and additional destinations.

europe.name: Greece
europe.focus: Ancient history, islands and Mediterranean culture.

americas.name: South America
americas.focus: Machu Picchu, Amazon and Patagonia experiences.

australia.name: Australia
australia.focus: Sydney, Great Barrier Reef and Outback adventures.

himalayan_neighbors.name: Enchanting Nepal
himalayan_neighbors.focus: Kathmandu valley temples and Himalayan landscapes.

notes.booking_method: Most packages are inquiry-based via phone or email.
